verdict_reason: BG 2.70's tags are operator-system-coupling, non-attachment-to-praise, team-state. CROSS-REFERENCE WITH SAME-TAG VERSES: (a) operator-system-coupling is shared with 2.48 (operator-state does not move with system-state), 2.68 (architected attention surfaces decouple), 2.69 (perceptual aperture decoupled from surface). 2.70 teaches: state-level does not rise with input-volume. These four verses are COMPATIBLE under a doctrine of structural decoupling, with 2.70 specifying the input-volume axis (where 2.48 specified the dashboard-direction axis, 2.68 specified the channel-architecture axis, 2.69 specified the perception-content axis). (b) team-state is shared with 2.48, 2.68, 2.69. 2.70's stance ('the launch's load passes through her too' from the senior operator) is compatible — the team-state pathology is the kāma-kāmī pattern, not the senior's level steadiness. (c) non-attachment-to-praise is introduced by 2.70 and the praise-side is anchored on the launch-load (CEO praise, conference invitations, recruiter outreach) which is the verse's specific contribution. CROSS-REFERENCES: none declared. Pass on both 6.1 and 6.5.
